summary: Adds a visual processor graph builder to the agent CMS in the playground UI. Introduces a drag-and-drop interface for configuring input/output processor pipelines with three layer types (step, parallel, conditional). Includes 38 new/modified files across playground-ui and playground packages: React components for the graph canvas, provider list, layer types, config dialogs; a useReducer-based state management hook; serialization/validation utilities; and comprehensive unit tests for serialization round-trips and reducer actions. CodeRabbit reviewed with minor suggestions (type safety, lazy initialization, defensive bounds checking). All changes are scoped to playground-ui/playground packages only.
maintainerNotes: Merge conflicts need to be resolved by the author before this can proceed. Two CI checks are failing (E2E Tests and Observability Package Tests) — these may be flaky/pre-existing since the PR only touches playground-ui and playground packages. The PR has a thorough description, a changeset, and good test coverage (2 test files covering serialization round-trips and reducer logic). CodeRabbit left actionable but non-blocking suggestions. No human reviewer has reviewed yet. This is part of a series of processor-related PRs (builds on #13219 and #13292). The XL size is justified as it introduces a self-contained new feature module.
